questions.question: Which pattern lets IoT devices send telemetry through a nearby aggregator?
questions.description: Gateways collect device telemetry and can provide protocol translation, filtering, and security controls.

questions.question: Which control helps ensure IoT firmware has not been tampered with?
questions.description: Secure boot verifies firmware integrity and authenticity before execution.

questions.question: Which network design limits risk from compromised IoT devices?
questions.description: Segmentation isolates IoT devices from sensitive systems.
